description_long: This is a discarded, partially crushed plastic bottle with a dark, burnt-looking exterior and visible branding and text in white and orange. The bottle's body is mostly black with orange and brown gradients, and the label features a world map graphic and various stylized fonts. The cap area is deformed and appears to be missing or melted, exposing a rough, irregular opening. The base of the bottle is also damaged, with jagged edges and a white, torn appearance. The surface is matte and shows signs of heavy wear, suggesting it has been exposed to heat or fire. The bottle is lightweight and hollow, likely made of thin plastic.
description: A damaged, burnt-looking plastic bottle with dark labels, exposed jagged openings, and visible branding in white and orange.
description_view_0: The side view shows the main label with white and orange text, a world map graphic, and a burnt, blackened surface.
description_view_1: The base view reveals a jagged, torn white opening with visible interior damage and rough edges.
description_view_2: The opposite side highlights the orange gradient, more branding text, and the deformed neck area.
description_view_3: The angled view shows the bottle's cap area, which is heavily damaged and partially missing, with the label wrapping around the body.
attribute_label_or_branding: Visible branding includes white and orange text, a world map graphic, and stylized fonts. The word 'TOP' is prominent in orange, and there are additional smaller text elements and logos in white and gold.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Severe deformation, burnt and melted areas, jagged torn openings at both ends, and heavy surface discoloration.
